apigateway-error-permissiondenied: Error message when the user does not have the required permission.
apigateway-error-badtoken: Error message when a CSRF token is invalid or missing for write operations.
apigateway-error-unknownendpoint:
Error message when the requested endpoint key does not exist in configuration.
* $1 - the endpoint key
apigateway-error-methodnotallowed:
Error message when the HTTP method is not allowed for the endpoint.
* $1 - the HTTP method
* $2 - the endpoint key
apigateway-error-invalidurl: Error message when the target URL is malformed.
apigateway-error-invalidscheme:
Error message for unsupported URL schemes.
* $1 - the scheme
apigateway-error-ssrf: Error message when the target URL resolves to a blocked internal network address.
apigateway-error-requestfailed:
Error message when the external HTTP request fails.
* $1 - error details
apigateway-error-bodytoolarge:
Error message when the request body exceeds the configured size limit.
* $1 - maximum size in bytes
